penalties.description: Maximum time reached before completion. Task shows suturing in progress but no final knot completion or suture cutting was observed.

reasoning: The video shows intracorporeal suturing technique with needle loading, suture placement through targets, and knot tying phases. However, the task appears incomplete as no final suture cutting is visible and the sequence ends with ongoing suturing work. Since completion was not achieved within the visible timeframe, this is scored as an incomplete task with zero points per FLS rubric.
